metadata.name: ario_arns
metadata.description: AR.IO ArNS Registry Program - Name registration, leasing, demand factor pricing

docs: AR.IO ArNS Registry Program
Handles:
- Name purchase - lease and permabuy (F30)
- Name upgrade - lease to permabuy (F31)
- Lease extension (F32)
- Undername limit increases (F33)
- Name reassignment (F34)
- Name release (F35)
- Returned name purchase with premium (F36)
- Name expiration/pruning (F37)
- Reserved names (F38)
- Token cost calculation (F39)
- Demand factor pricing (F40)

instructions.name: buy_name
docs: Buy a new ArNS name (F30)

accounts.name: reserved_name_check
docs: Must be the correct PDA even if no reservation exists (will have empty data).

accounts.name: returned_name_check
docs: Must be the correct PDA even if no returned name exists (will have empty data).

instructions.name: buy_name_from_delegation
docs: Buy a new ArNS name funded from delegated stake

instructions.name: buy_name_from_funding_plan
docs: Buy name via a multi-source funding plan (CPIs into ario-gar's pay_from_funding_plan).
`discount_account_count` (0 or 1) tells the wrapper how many discount-gateway PDAs are
at the front of remaining_accounts; the rest are funding-source PDAs.

instructions.name: buy_name_from_operator_stake
docs: Buy a new ArNS name funded from operator stake

instructions.name: buy_name_from_withdrawal
docs: Buy name funded from a Withdrawal vault (single source).

instructions.name: buy_returned_name
docs: Buy a returned name with premium multiplier (F36)

instructions.name: buy_returned_name_from_delegation
docs: Buy a returned name funded from delegated stake

accounts.name: buyer_token_account
docs: Buyer's token account (needed for initiator's share of returned name split)

accounts.name: initiator_token_account
docs: Initiator's token account (for their 50% share)

instructions.name: buy_returned_name_from_funding_plan
docs: Buy returned name via a multi-source funding plan (protocol share only;
initiator share stays a direct buyer→initiator SPL transfer).

instructions.name: buy_returned_name_from_operator_stake
docs: Buy a returned name funded from operator stake

accounts.name: buyer_token_account
docs: Buyer's token account (needed for initiator's share)

accounts.name: initiator_token_account
docs: Initiator's token account (for their 50% share)

instructions.name: buy_returned_name_from_withdrawal
docs: Buy returned name funded from a Withdrawal vault (protocol portion only).

instructions.name: claim_reserved_name
docs: Claim a reserved name

instructions.name: create_name_registry
docs: Create the NameRegistry zero-copy account.
Separated from initialize because the 2MB account needs a dedicated tx
with sufficient compute and rent. Only callable by authority.

instructions.name: extend_lease
docs: Extend the lease period (F32)

instructions.name: extend_lease_from_delegation
docs: Extend lease funded from delegated stake

instructions.name: extend_lease_from_funding_plan
docs: Extend lease via a multi-source funding plan.

instructions.name: extend_lease_from_operator_stake
docs: Extend lease funded from operator stake

instructions.name: extend_lease_from_withdrawal
docs: Extend lease funded from a Withdrawal vault.

instructions.name: finalize_migration
docs: Permanently disable migration imports (main authority only)

instructions.name: get_token_cost
docs: Calculate token cost for an operation (F39)

instructions.name: import_account
docs: Import a pre-serialized account during migration

instructions.name: import_registry_entry
docs: Import a name entry into the NameRegistry

instructions.name: increase_undername_limit
docs: Increase undername limit (F33)

instructions.name: increase_undername_limit_from_delegation
docs: Increase undername limit funded from delegated stake

instructions.name: increase_undername_limit_from_funding_plan
docs: Increase undername limit via a multi-source funding plan.

instructions.name: increase_undername_limit_from_operator_stake
docs: Increase undername limit funded from operator stake

instructions.name: increase_undername_limit_from_withdrawal
docs: Increase undername limit funded from a Withdrawal vault.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize the ArNS registry and demand factor

accounts.name: authority
docs: Bind initialize to the program's upgrade authority — closes the
front-run window between `solana program deploy` and `initialize`
(audit H1 / Theme C). Explicit `Some(authority.key())` equality
rejects revoked upgrade authority (`None`).

instructions.name: prune_expired_names
docs: Prune expired name leases

accounts.name: name_registry
docs: M5: NameRegistry for removing pruned entries

instructions.name: prune_expired_reservation
docs: GAP-9: Prune expired reserved names (permissionless)

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can prune expired reservations (permissionless)

instructions.name: prune_name_to_returned
docs: Prune a single expired name to a returned name (Dutch auction)

instructions.name: prune_returned_names
docs: Prune returned names past their auction window

instructions.name: reassign_name
docs: Reassign name to a different ANT/process (F34)

instructions.name: release_name
docs: Release a permanent name back to the registry (F35)

instructions.name: reserve_name
docs: Reserve a name (admin only)

instructions.name: unreserve_name
docs: Remove a reservation (admin only)

instructions.name: update_demand_factor
docs: Update demand factor for new period

instructions.name: upgrade_name
docs: Upgrade a lease to permanent ownership (F31)

instructions.name: upgrade_name_from_delegation
docs: Upgrade lease to permabuy funded from delegated stake

instructions.name: upgrade_name_from_funding_plan
docs: Upgrade lease to permabuy via a multi-source funding plan.

instructions.name: upgrade_name_from_operator_stake
docs: Upgrade lease to permabuy funded from operator stake

instructions.name: upgrade_name_from_withdrawal
docs: Upgrade lease to permabuy funded from a Withdrawal vault.

errors.name: ForbiddenNameLength
errors.msg: Name length matches Arweave address length

errors.name: NameStillActive
errors.msg: Name is active and cannot be purchased

errors.name: ExtensionExceedsMax
errors.msg: Lease extension exceeds maximum allowed years

errors.name: NotProcessOwner
errors.msg: Only the ANT process owner can reassign

errors.name: NameNotReturned
errors.msg: Name is not in returned state

errors.name: NameNotExpired
errors.msg: Name not expired past auction window — use prune_name_to_returned for Dutch auction

errors.name: NotReservationHolder
errors.msg: Not authorized to claim this name

errors.name: NotAntHolder
errors.msg: Caller is not the ANT NFT holder

errors.name: GatewayNotActive
errors.msg: Gateway is not in active (Joined) status

errors.name: NotGatewayOperator
errors.msg: Signer is not the gateway operator

errors.name: DemandFactorNotReady
errors.msg: Demand factor period not ready for update

errors.name: InvalidAntAsset
errors.msg: Invalid ANT asset - must be a valid Metaplex Core asset

errors.name: InvalidAccountData
errors.msg: Invalid account data for migration import

errors.name: InvalidPda
errors.msg: PDA derivation does not match target account

types.name: ArnsConfig
docs: ArNS registry configuration
PDA: ["arns_config"]

fields.name: authority
docs: Program upgrade / admin authority

fields.name: mint
docs: ARIO SPL token mint

fields.name: treasury
docs: Treasury token account for protocol revenue

fields.name: grace_period_seconds
docs: Grace period after lease expiry (seconds, default 14 days)

fields.name: return_auction_duration_seconds
docs: Duration of a returned-name auction (seconds, default 14 days)

fields.name: max_lease_length_years
docs: Maximum lease length in years (default 5)

fields.name: total_names_registered
docs: Running count of names ever registered

fields.name: next_records_prune_timestamp
docs: Next timestamp at which expired records should be pruned

fields.name: next_returned_names_prune_timestamp
docs: Next timestamp at which returned names should be pruned

fields.name: migration_active
docs: Whether migration import is active (permanently disabled by finalize_migration)

fields.name: migration_authority
docs: Dedicated migration authority (hot key for batch imports)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

types.name: ArnsRecord
docs: ArNS name record
PDA: ["arns_record", name_hash]
NOTE: Uses SHA256 hash of lowercase name as seed to prevent collision attacks.
Field order is **load-bearing**: every fixed-size field comes before
the variable-length `name` so external callers can `memcmp`-filter
`getProgramAccounts` queries on `ant` (offset 72) or `owner`
(offset 40) at fixed byte offsets. Notably this lets the SDK
resolve "ArNS records for this ANT mint" as a true point query
without scanning every record. See
`docs/ACCOUNT_SCALING_PATTERNS.md` for the broader pattern.
Offsets (Borsh, in bytes):
- discriminator:         0
- name_hash:             8   (32)
- owner:                 40  (32)  ← memcmp candidate
- ant:                   72  (32)  ← memcmp candidate
- purchase_type:         104 (1)
- start_timestamp:       105 (8)
- end_timestamp:         113 (1 + 8 option)
- undername_limit:       122 (2)
- purchase_price:        124 (8)
- name (variable-length): 133 (4 + ≤51)

fields.name: name_hash
docs: SHA256 hash of lowercase name (used for PDA derivation)

fields.name: owner
docs: Current owner. NOTE (ISSUES.md, Minor): set at purchase, never
updated, never read on-chain. Slated for removal — kept here
for now to avoid a second schema break.

fields.name: ant
docs: Associated ANT (Metaplex NFT mint). Authoritative for all
"who controls this name" decisions — flows through MPL Core
asset ownership + `AntControllers`.

fields.name: purchase_type
docs: Lease or Permabuy

fields.name: start_timestamp
docs: When the name was purchased (seconds)

fields.name: end_timestamp
docs: When the lease expires (seconds); None for permabuy

fields.name: undername_limit
docs: Maximum number of undernames

fields.name: purchase_price
docs: Price paid at purchase (mARIO)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

fields.name: name
docs: The name string (max 51 chars, original casing preserved).
Variable-length — must remain the last field so all preceding
fields stay at fixed byte offsets for memcmp filtering.

fields.name: ant
docs: The ANT (Arweave Name Token) address controlling this name.
Named `ant` (not `process_id`) to follow Solana conventions.

fields.name: ant
docs: The ANT (Arweave Name Token) address controlling this name.

types.name: DemandFactor
docs: Demand-factor state, updated once per period (day).
PDA: ["demand_factor"]
The demand factor adjusts name prices based on recent purchase activity.
Each period, the factor is multiplied by UP (1.05) if purchases exceed the
trailing-period moving average, or by DOWN (0.985) otherwise. If the factor
remains at MIN for MAX_PERIODS_AT_MIN_DEMAND_FACTOR consecutive periods the
fee table is permanently halved and the factor resets to 1.0.

fields.name: current_demand_factor
docs: Current demand factor, scaled by 1_000_000 (starts at 1_000_000 = 1.0)

fields.name: current_period
docs: Current period number (1-based, increments each day)

fields.name: purchases_this_period
docs: Number of name purchases in the current (incomplete) period

fields.name: revenue_this_period
docs: Revenue collected in the current (incomplete) period (mARIO)

fields.name: consecutive_periods_with_min_demand_factor
docs: How many consecutive periods the factor has been at DEMAND_FACTOR_MIN

fields.name: trailing_period_purchases
docs: Trailing purchase counts for the last 7 completed periods

fields.name: trailing_period_revenues
docs: Trailing revenue for the last 7 completed periods

fields.name: fees
docs: Mutable fee table (starts as GENESIS_FEES, permanently halved when demand stays low)

fields.name: period_zero_start_timestamp
docs: Timestamp of period-zero start (anchor for computing current period)

fields.name: criteria
docs: Criteria for determining if demand is increasing (0 = revenue, 1 = purchases)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

types.name: DemandFactorUpdatedEvent
docs: Emitted by `update_demand_factor`. Carries the post-roll factor and
period index so indexers can plot demand-factor history without
snapshotting every block. `fees_halved` flips true on the call that
triggers the permanent fee-halving event (after MAX_PERIODS_AT_MIN
consecutive periods at the floor).

types.name: FundingSourceKind
docs: Tagged enum describing one source in a funding plan.
Multi-gateway: each source carries its own gateway PDA in remaining_accounts
(no single shared `gateway` slot). Each source consumes a known number of
`remaining_accounts` slots in declaration order — the handler iterates and
slices. See `docs/MULTI_GATEWAY_FUNDING_PLAN.md` for the full layout.

types.name: FundingSourceSpec
docs: One entry in the funding plan vector.

types.name: LeaseExtendedEvent
docs: Emitted when a lease is extended.

types.name: NameEntry
docs: Entry in the name registry for enumeration

fields.name: name_hash
docs: SHA256 hash of the name (matches ArnsRecord PDA derivation)

fields.name: registry_index
docs: Index in the registry (for O(1) removal)

fields.name: _padding
docs: Padding for alignment

types.name: NamePurchasedEvent
docs: Emitted on every successful name purchase. Covers `buy_name` plus
all four `buy_name_from_*` variants (delegation / operator_stake /
withdrawal / funding_plan) — the funding path is encoded in
`funding_source`.

fields.name: purchase_type
docs: 0 = Lease, 1 = Permabuy (see PURCHASE_TYPE_* constants)

fields.name: years
docs: 0 for permabuy

fields.name: cost
docs: mARIO charged

fields.name: ant
docs: ANT mint assigned to this name

fields.name: funding_source
docs: See FUNDING_SOURCE_* constants

types.name: NameReassignedEvent
docs: Emitted when an existing record's ANT pubkey is rotated.

types.name: NameRegistry
docs: Global name registry for efficient enumeration
PDA: ["name_registry"]
NOTE: Uses zero-copy for performance with large name counts
This enables the epoch system to prescribe names without an off-chain indexer

fields.name: names
docs: Array of name hashes (SHA256) for registered active names
Names are added when purchased and removed when expired/released
DEVNET-SIZED on the `deploy/devnet` branch: 200 slots instead of
the production 200_000. This is a smoke-test devnet — full AO
snapshot import (3,758 names) is intentionally out-of-scope; that
flow is exercised on localnet. **Do not merge this change to
`main`** — mainnet must keep the full 200_000 capacity. Bumped
from 100→200 to give downstream-app developers headroom to
`buy-record` (80 imported fixtures + 120 dev seats); see
`resize_name_registry` for the admin instruction that grows the
existing on-chain account in place.

types.name: NameReleasedEvent
docs: Emitted when an owner releases a name back to the auction pool.

types.name: NameReservedEvent
docs: Emitted when the protocol authority reserves a name (optionally
targeted to a specific address, optionally with an expiry).

types.name: NameUnreservedEvent
docs: Emitted when the protocol authority removes a reservation.

types.name: NameUpgradedEvent
docs: Emitted when an existing lease is upgraded to a permabuy.

types.name: NamesPrunedEvent
docs: Emitted once per permissionless prune transaction with a count of
how many records were pruned and a `kind` discriminator. NEVER
emitted inside the loop — see EVENT_EMISSION_PLAN for log-truncation
rationale. `count = 0` is a valid payload (the instruction can
no-op when nothing in `remaining_accounts` is actually expired).

fields.name: kind
docs: 0 = expired_lease, 1 = returned, 2 = expired_reservation

types.name: ReservedName
docs: Reserved name
PDA: ["reserved_name", name_hash]

fields.name: name
docs: The name string (max 51 chars)

fields.name: reserved_for
docs: Optional address the name is reserved for

fields.name: expires_at
docs: Optional expiry of the reservation (seconds)

fields.name: reserved_by
docs: Authority that created the reservation

fields.name: created_at
docs: When the reservation was created (seconds)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

types.name: ReservedNameClaimedEvent
docs: Emitted when the protocol authority claims back a reserved slot
(administrative cleanup, no fee). The actual name purchase by an
end user is covered by `NamePurchasedEvent`.

types.name: ReturnedName
docs: Returned name (released or expired, available via Dutch auction)
PDA: ["returned_name", name_hash]
Floor price and premium multiplier are computed dynamically from
`returned_at`, the current timestamp, and RETURNED_NAME_DURATION_SECONDS /
RETURNED_NAME_MAX_MULTIPLIER, so they are NOT stored on-chain.

fields.name: name
docs: The name string (max 51 chars)

fields.name: name_hash
docs: SHA256 hash of lowercase name

fields.name: initiator
docs: Who initiated the return (owner who released, or protocol for expiry)

fields.name: returned_at
docs: Timestamp when the name was returned (seconds)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

types.name: ReturnedNamePurchasedEvent
docs: Emitted on returned-name (Dutch auction) purchase. Same shape as
`NamePurchasedEvent` plus `premium` (the auction premium charged
above the floor cost) and minus `purchase_type` / `years`
(returned names are always permabuy-equivalent for the buyer).

fields.name: purchase_type
docs: Required for IncreaseUndernameLimit to distinguish lease vs permabuy pricing

types.name: UndernameIncreasedEvent
docs: Emitted when a record's undername limit is increased.
